name: Taco Chile Cheese Soup with Rice
recipeIngredient: 3 pieces Chicken breast, cooked and chopped into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 6-quart Dutch oven, cook the bacon over medium heat until crisp.
2. Pour off the bacon grease and add the onion, garlic, and peppers. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until softened about 4 minutes.
3. Add oregano, cumin, taco seasoning, and rice to the mixture. Toss and cook for about 1 minute.
4. Pour in the white wine and deglaze the pan by scraping up any brown bits from the bottom.
5. Add the stewed tomatoes (pre-blended to remove large chunks), chicken broth, and chilli beans.
6. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer for 30 minutes.
7. About 15 minutes before serving, add the chopped chicken breast, season with salt and pepper to taste, crumbled bacon, and cilantro. Stir in the grated cheese until melted.
8. Serve hot and garnish with additional cilantro if desired.
